title: cantinoa racemulosa
intro: Cantinoa racemulosa, a species of flowering plant in the family Plantaginaceae, is also known as Purple Cantua. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Cantinoa racemulosa include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is often used in herbal preparations to promote relaxation and well-being.
